author: Unwindology
name: SP8192 + 9L Breadcrumb + EMA + Stochastic Depth
technique_summary: SP8192 byte-fallback tokenizer + 9L x 512d x 8H/4KV GQA + MLP 2x + Breadcrumb gating + EMA(0.997) + Stochastic depth + Muon optimizer + Int6 + zlib
notes: Single-seed submission from an independent researcher on self-funded compute. A 10-layer variant reached ~1.1745 fp16 but could not be compressed under the 16 MB cap and was not packaged. Supersedes 2026-04-17 entry (val_bpb 1.18034, 15,880,130 bytes) after an overnight confirmation and challenger session on 2026-04-21 in which four alternative strategies were tested and none improved on this record.
